name: Myron Butler
description: '''Myron Demond Butler''' (born July 27, 1974) is an American [[gospel music]]ian, record producer, singer-songwriter, music director, vocalist, organist and pianist. Most notably, he is known as the leader of the gospel choir, [[Myron Butler & Levi]]. Since 1997, he has worked as a [[music director|vocal director]] and backup singer for several notable artists, including [[Kirk Franklin]], [[Marvin Sapp]], [[Smokie Norful]], [[Donald Lawrence]] and [[Yolanda Adams]].
